quesadillas-recipe-comedera.name: Quesadillas Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/5 kg queso para fundir (rallado o troceado.)

instructions: Replate a napkin with a few drops of oil very slightly and rub it onto the surface of a frying pan to achieve an almost imperperceptible cover.
briefly heat (at medium low heat) a pair of tortillas onto the frying pan (or more if space remains). The aim is to avoid breaking them as they fold them.
Disponer una buena cantidad de queso al centro de cada tortilla, estirando un poco hacia arriba y hacia abajo.
Fold every omelette by half, according to the "line" created with the cheese.

To leave the cheesadilla a little more time onto the frying pan but only what's necessary for the cheese to melt. Flow onto both sides so that the omelette will be nailed more from one side than from the other.
Withdraw every cheesadilla with a pallet (after much practice you can also with your hands, without burning).
Repeat the process with more tortillas and more cheese.

quinoa-salad-with-roasted-yams.name: Quinoa Salad With Roasted Yams

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil; add yams.
Bake in the preheated oven until yams are tender and wrinkled at the edges, about 20 minutes. Cool to room temperature, about 15 minutes

Bring water to a boil in a large saucepan. Add quinoa, stirring once; return to boil. Cook uncovered until water is absorbed, 10 to 12 minutes. Strain, shaking the sieve well to remove all moisture. Transfer to a mixing bowl.
Stir cucumbers, yams, parsley, olive oil, onion, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, salt, and pepper into the quinoa. Garnish with endive spears.
